input:
INTERNAL — AGENT EYES ONLY
Property: 3-bed apartment, Puerto Banús, 7th floor with sea views.
Owner: Liang W., Chinese national, non-resident.
Under investigation for VAT irregularities — lawyer says
sale must complete before December or asset freeze risk.
Won't go below €890,000 but started at €1.1M — room to move.
Damp patch in master bedroom ceiling; roof terrace above has
a slow leak. Has not been disclosed in marketing materials.
Tenants currently occupying under a verbal arrangement —
no formal contract, may complicate vacant possession.
We hold the only mandate. No portal listing yet.
Categories: C1 (nationality), C2 (tax investigation), C3 (floor price/room to move), C4 (damp/leak undisclosed), C6 (tenant situation), C7 (exclusive mandate), C8 (December deadline)
output:
TAGS: [Exclusive listing] [Sea views] [Negotiation margin available] [Renovation budget advised] [Verify occupancy]

DESCRIPTION: This three-bedroom apartment on the 7th floor in Puerto Banús features stunning sea views. It is an ideal residence for those seeking a sophisticated lifestyle in a premier coastal destination. This exclusive opportunity is available for immediate inquiry.
